ksa_text: Knowledge of data remediation tools and techniques, including data cleansing, standardization, deduplication, enrichment, imputation approaches, and quality improvement workflows for addressing identified data issues.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-018 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.410 composite (highest: NICE at 0.410) and is in_scope for the ISO 8000 Data Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 4. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level ISO 8000 Data Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, NICE signal (0.410), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of ISO 8000 Data Manager job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.410 is market-validated for ISO 8000 Data Manager. Final decision: include.
